title: Coin Master
notes:
Thanks for playing Coin Master!

In this version, we’ve implemented bug fixes & performance improvements.

We have also implemented our new reward calendar feature - collect your daily rewards! 

Enjoy a world of fun, thrills, and huge rewards right at your fingertips. 

Invite your friends to play Coin Master & get your FREE REWARDS! We also recommend joining our community on Facebook, X, and Instagram for more fun & excitement.

Enjoying Coin Master? Leave a review :)

title: Hole.io
notes:
The hole is hungry - and now, so is your inner collector.

• COLLECTIBLES ARE HERE - Dive into levels, hunt for hidden spheres, and crack them open to discover unique figurines. Build your themed Album, complete the set before time runs out, and earn special rewards along the way. Got duplicates? Turn them into coins and keep hunting.
• A CLEANER GAME - Banner ads have been completely removed. Nothing between you and your next meal.

title: EA SPORTS FC™ Fotball Mobile
notes:
Spela The World’s Game-uppdateringen. Tävla i en global fotbollsturnering och led ditt landslag till framgång. Upplev autentiska spelarattribut med spelstilar som förverkligar atleternas unika förmågor. Få kontakt med vänner direkt och spela PVP i Snabbmatch. FC Mobile stöder nu hindi, tjeckiska och polska. The World’s Game-uppdateringen innehåller även ett helt nytt nostalgiskt soundtrack.
 
VÄRLDENS SPELTURNERING
Tävla mot världen i The World’s Game internationella fotbollsturnering. Välj blan

title: Jelly Busters: Puzzle Game
notes: We are incredibly excited to announce the official launch of Jelly Busters! Drop into the coolest skatepark in town and experience a puzzle game that is as colorful and beautiful as it is satisfying. With soft ASMR pops, glowing hues, and hidden artistic masterpieces to destroy, every run is a relaxing yet thrilling ride...grab your board to join the crew and start busting!
